name: Darrel Johnson Golf Academy
about: Darrel Johnson Golf Academy is a golf training studio offering both indoor and outdoor instruction options. They operate primarily out of Zebulon Country Club and provide indoor lessons at Brookfields Indoor Golf & Lounge Simulator when temperatures are below 45 degrees. The academy focuses on private and group lessons for all ages, with a specialization in beginners. Pricing is straightforward, with rates starting at $20 per hour for kids and $25-$40 for other lesson types and sessions. The facility emphasizes a mix of theoretical and practical instruction, tailored to individual needs and skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Affordable, flat-rate pricing starting at $20 per hour
Specializes in beginner instruction with a focus on fundamentals
Flexible indoor simulator location for all-weather play
Patient and experienced coaching suitable for all ages

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service available
No information on alcohol service available

simulator_hardware.notes: Used for indoor lessons when temperatures are below 45 degrees

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether clubs are provided. It is recommended to bring your own equipment, but you may contact them directly for clarification.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service or a policy on outside food and beverages on the website.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific information on the duration of a full 18-hole simulation.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the academy specifically offers instruction for kids and has programs like 'Kids Instruction' and 'Saturday at 12 under 6 First Club Clinic'.
